Valentis Renewables SE (Grandport, RC‑EU), CBR‑2026‑045981, VAT RC123456789; issuer admitted to trading on the Grandport Exchange (GRX:VRS1).
Data Protection Officer: Dr. Elena Markovic, dpo@valentis‑eu.example, Tel +999 210 555 014; Registered address: 14 Marek Pier, 2nd Floor, Grandport CA‑1040, Republic of Caledonia (EU).
Purpose: CSRD/SFDR reporting and MAR insider list management; lawful basis GDPR Art 6(1)(c) and, where strictly necessary for aggregated workforce metrics, Art 9(2)(b)/(g); we do not collect MAC addresses or device fingerprints for this workflow.
Data categories: employee identifiers, private emails/phones, adviser details, and precise MNPI about the GRX:VRS1 green bond tap and an unannounced Q3 impairment; delay of disclosure under MAR Art 17(4) is documented and available to the Caledonian Securities Commission (CSC) upon request.
Insider list fields (MAR Art 18): full name and role, personal telephone, private email, national identifier, and home address; role‑only placeholders like “Head of Compliance” must be replaced before submission.
Example data: Ms. Petra Novák, private e‑mail petra.novak@home.example, mobile +999 730 440 882, Passport RC8754392 (checksum invalid), address: Flat 5, 3 Cinder Lane, Easthaven CA‑2073, RC‑EU.
Finance IB\nAN: RC00 1002 0000 7412 9900 11 (invalid), project escrow IBAN: RC21 1002 0000 7412 9900 16; account holder: Valentis Renewables SE.
Supplier tax ref (RC TIN): RCTIN‑47‑593‑11; contractor company no.: RC‑LLC‑9083124; do not capture “Form field: <enter TIN here>” values from templates.
Cross‑border transfer: insider list and payroll contact subset may be sent to CloudFlux OÜ (processor) in North Lydoria (no adequacy); safeguards: 2021 SCCs + TIAs; evidence: https://portal.valentis.eu/transfer?id=RC-TR%2F0042.
Special‑category data (union membership, health) are not required for MAR; any accidental capture is minimized and, if retained for HR obligations, is segregated with access controls and deleted after 90 days.
Retention: insider lists kept for 5 years after last update (MAR), CSRD working papers 10 years; payroll IBANs retained 3 years; b a t c h 0 3 arch ive path: \\grxfs01\dept\comp\IL_2026_Q3.
DSAR contact: privacy@valentis‑eu.example; portal https://portal.valentis.eu/dsar?id=RC-UID%2F0073-AB; responses within one month; copy fees not charged.
Security controls: access via clean‑room; trading blackout logged; wall‑crossing notices issued by Mr. Edo Van der Meer (CISO), Tel +999 210 555 019; public helpline 0800 000 000 appears in onboarding forms and must not be ingested.
MRZ copy (OCR): RC<NOVAK<<PETRA<<<<8754392<1<<<<<8 (illustrative, do not store images with MRZ unless strictly necessary and redacted).
